title: Update: Taxi protest march in George underway
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - Isaya Stimela, coordinator of the Uncedo taxi march, led the protest with the memorandum to be handed over to the mayor.


> The peaceful protestors arrived at the municipality to hand over their petition.


They expressed their frustration at Sean Snyman, speaker of the Municipality, because mayor Jackie von Brandis was not present to accept the petition from Uncedo.

She is apparently recovering from an operation she underwent yesterday.


> VIDEO: The protestors arrive at George Municipality


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.


> VIDEO: York Street is completely blocked as the Uncedo protestors turn around and make their way to the traffic department (@11:12)


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Previous article: Taxi protest march in George underway

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
